channel.title: IBD LitMonitor - Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)
channel.description: IBD literature monitoring: Point of Care Testing (non-IUS)

item.title: Efficacy and safety of compound Qingdai enema in rapidly alleviating inflammatory activity in ulcerative colitis: a prospective study.
item.description: Frontiers in pharmacology - To observe the efficacy and safety of CQE in rapidly alleviating inflammatory activity in UC. CQE extracts were analyzed by UHPLC-Q Exactive Orbitrap-HRMS. This study used a self-controlled design ...
